title: ctenopteris antioquiana
intro: Ctenopteris antioquiana, also known as Colombian maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to Colombia. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Ctenopteris antioquiana include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, and it can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions to promote overall well-being.
